summary: BLOCK 541-545 Profile header and TreasuryHeader UI restructuring tested successfully. All features verified: Follow/Message buttons relocated to left column (BLOCK 541), right column streamlined (BLOCK 542), country flag integration (BLOCK 543), identity cluster vertical layout (BLOCK 544), TreasuryHeader glassmorphism (BLOCK 545). Mobile responsiveness confirmed - buttons tappable without overlap.

minor.issue: 503 errors from external image service (not app-related)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 541 ✅ - Follow/Message buttons in profile-social-actions container (lines 462-488)
BLOCK 541 ✅ - Buttons positioned in left column next to avatar, after Report/Block icons
BLOCK 542 ✅ - profile-control-panel (lines 629-717) contains only: Taste Match pill, Stripe status, Golden Hive badge/CTA, Edit Profile
BLOCK 542 ✅ - No Follow/Message buttons in right column (verified via Playwright)
BLOCK 543 ✅ - Country flag via countryFlag() utility at line 507, displayed with data-testid='profile-country-flag'
BLOCK 543 ✅ - Flag shows 🇺🇸 for katieintheafterglow user

BLOCK 544 ✅ - Identity cluster vertical flow: Row 1 (admin-action-icons lines 451-460), Row 2 (profile-social-actions lines 463-489), Row 3 (username lines 493-498), Row 4 (location+flag lines 505-509)
BLOCK 545 ✅ - TreasuryHeader glassmorphism (CollectionPage.js lines 73-84): background rgba(252,248,232,0.5), backdrop-filter blur(12px), border 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6), soft shadow
BLOCK 545 ✅ - 'vs' divider uses deeper gold color #B8860B (line 141)
Mobile ✅ - Follow button at y=151, Message at y=151, Username at y=213 - no overlap, buttons clickable
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKs 541-545 verified. Profile header restructured with identity cluster in left column (Report/Block -> Follow/Message -> Username -> Location+Flag). Right column has Taste Match, Stripe, Golden Hive, Edit Profile. TreasuryHeader (CollectionPage) uses glassmorphism styling - only visible when user has collection values. Test with katieintheafterglow profile for all elements.

block_541.description: Follow and Message buttons in left section (profile-social-actions)

block_542.description: Right column (profile-control-panel) streamlined - no Follow/Message buttons
block_542.test_method: Playwright verified Taste Match pill, Golden Hive badge present; Follow/Message absent

block_543.description: Country flag emoji via countryFlag() utility

block_544.description: Identity cluster vertical layout in left column
block_544.test_method: Verified presence of admin-action-icons, profile-social-actions, profile-username in correct order

block_545.test_method: Code review confirmed: rgba(252,248,232,0.5) background, blur(12px), white border, #B8860B for 'vs' divider

mobile_responsiveness.description: Follow/Message buttons tappable on mobile, no overlap with username
mobile_responsiveness.test_method: Mobile viewport (390x844) test - buttons at y=151, username at y=213

frontend_compiles.test_method: ESLint on ProfilePage.js and CollectionPage.js returned no issues
